name: frontman
description: Marketplace for the frontman orchestration skill

plugins.name: frontman
plugins.description: Turn your strongest model into a team-lead orchestrator: it plans and reviews, routes execution to the cheapest capable seat (Claude subagents or auto-detected Codex CLI workers), and blind-verifies every meaningful change before accepting it. Compiles to a deterministic, schema-enforced Workflow when the harness supports one.
